message:
feat(dashboard): add health indicators to pane cards

Implement ntm-unwu to show agent health information on dashboard:

- Add HealthUpdateMsg and PaneHealthInfo types for health data
- Add health fields to PaneStatus (HealthStatus, HealthIssues, RestartCount, UptimeSeconds)
- Add fetchHealthCmd() to periodically fetch health from health.CheckSession
- Add HealthUpdateMsg handler to update pane status with health data
- Display health badges on pane cards:
  - Warning/Error status badges with appropriate colors
  - Restart count badge when restarts > 0
  - First health issue as tooltip in extended mode

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
